A clear, concise description of the bug.

| Warehouse dialect | e.g. ClickHouse, DuckDB, Snowflake |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Go version (`go version`) | |

paste error here

## Minimal reproduction

If possible, a minimal `sqlforge.yml` + `.sql` model that reproduces the issue. The smaller, the faster we can fix it.

## Additional context

Any other context (screenshots, related issues, workarounds you've tried).
